title: hedeoma palmeri subsp. palmeri
intro: Hedeoma palmeri subsp. palmeri, also known as Palmer's false pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly pulegone. The medicinal properties of Hedeoma palmeri subsp. palmeri make it beneficial for treating digestive issues, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
